impactLevels.name: DoD Impact Level 2
impactLevels.dataClassification: Non-CUI (Controlled Unclassified Information) unclassified data that has been cleared for public release, or low-sensitivity DoD data not designated as CUI.

securityRequirements.encryption: TLS 1.2+ for data in transit. AES-256 for data at rest recommended but not mandatory.
securityRequirements.network: Internet-facing permitted. Standard firewall and IDS/IPS protections required.
securityRequirements.personnel: No specific clearance requirements. Standard background checks for administrators.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: Standard commercial data center security controls. SOC 2 Type II compliance.

azureImplementation.region: Azure Commercial (any US region) or Azure Government
azureImplementation.network: Virtual networks with NSGs. Azure Firewall recommended. No dedicated connectivity required.
azureImplementation.identity: Azure AD with MFA. Conditional Access policies. RBAC at subscription level.
azureImplementation.encryption: Azure Storage Service Encryption (SSE) with Microsoft-managed keys. Azure Key Vault optional.

impactLevels.name: DoD Impact Level 4
impactLevels.dataClassification: Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI). Includes FOUO, Privacy Act, HIPAA, export-controlled, and other sensitive but unclassified data.

securityRequirements.encryption: FIPS 140-2 validated cryptographic modules required. TLS 1.2+ mandatory. AES-256 for data at rest.
securityRequirements.network: Logical separation from commercial tenants. Dedicated ExpressRoute or VPN connections recommended. CAP not required.
securityRequirements.personnel: US persons only for data handling and administration. Favorable background investigation.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: FedRAMP High equivalent physical security controls. US-based data centers only.

azureImplementation.region: Azure Government (US Gov Virginia, US Gov Arizona, US Gov Texas)
azureImplementation.network: Azure Government ExpressRoute. Virtual networks with NSGs and Azure Firewall. Network isolation from commercial Azure.
azureImplementation.identity: Azure AD for Government with CAC/PIV authentication. Conditional Access with device compliance. Azure AD PIM for privileged access.
azureImplementation.encryption: Azure Key Vault with FIPS 140-2 Level 2 HSMs. Customer-managed keys (CMK) for data at rest. TLS 1.2 enforced.

impactLevels.name: DoD Impact Level 5
impactLevels.dataClassification: Higher-sensitivity CUI and National Security Systems (NSS) data. Includes mission-critical CUI, controlled defense information (CDI), and data requiring enhanced protections beyond IL4.

securityRequirements.encryption: FIPS 140-2 Level 1 minimum. FIPS 140-2 Level 3 HSMs recommended. Double encryption for data at rest.
securityRequirements.network: Dedicated connections required. Cross-domain solutions for any commercial connectivity. CAP (Cloud Access Point) required.
securityRequirements.personnel: US citizens only. Secret clearance required for administrators. Background investigation for all personnel.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: Dedicated physical infrastructure. US government-contracted facilities. 24/7 physical security monitoring.

azureImplementation.region: Azure Government (dedicated IL5 regions: US Gov Virginia, US Gov Arizona with IL5 PA)
azureImplementation.network: Azure Government ExpressRoute with dedicated circuits. Azure Firewall Premium. SCCA compliance. CAP connectivity.
azureImplementation.identity: Azure AD for Government with CAC/PIV. Azure AD PIM mandatory. Privileged Access Workstations (PAW) required.
azureImplementation.encryption: Azure Key Vault Managed HSM (FIPS 140-2 Level 3). Customer-managed keys mandatory. Double encryption at rest.

impactLevels.name: DoD Impact Level 6
impactLevels.dataClassification: Classified information up to SECRET level. Includes National Security Information (NSI) classified at the SECRET level and mission-critical classified data.

securityRequirements.encryption: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 required. NSA-approved (Suite B) cryptographic algorithms. Hardware-based encryption mandatory.
securityRequirements.network: Air-gapped or SIPRNet connectivity only. No commercial internet access. Cross-domain solutions require NSA approval.
securityRequirements.personnel: US citizens with active SECRET clearance minimum. TS/SCI for administrators recommended. Continuous evaluation program.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: SCIF-equivalent facilities. Dedicated government data centers. Armed guards. Intrusion detection systems.

azureImplementation.network: Air-gapped Azure Government Secret regions. SIPRNet connectivity. No internet connectivity. Dedicated HAIPE encryptors.
azureImplementation.identity: PKI-based authentication (SIPRNet tokens). Dedicated identity infrastructure. No federation with commercial Azure AD.
azureImplementation.encryption: NSA-approved Suite B cryptography. Dedicated HSMs. Hardware-based encryption for all data. Key management per CNSS policies.

fedRampBaselines.name: FedRAMP Low Baseline
fedRampBaselines.dataClassification: Low-impact federal information systems. Data loss would have limited adverse effect on organizational operations, assets, or individuals.

securityRequirements.encryption: TLS 1.2+ for data in transit. Encryption at rest recommended.
securityRequirements.network: Standard perimeter protections. Firewalls and basic IDS.
securityRequirements.personnel: Background checks for personnel with system access.

fedRampBaselines.name: FedRAMP Moderate Baseline
fedRampBaselines.dataClassification: Moderate-impact federal information systems. Includes most CUI. Data loss would have serious adverse effect on operations.

securityRequirements.encryption: FIPS 140-2 validated modules for data in transit and at rest.
securityRequirements.network: Network segmentation. IDS/IPS. Web Application Firewall (WAF).
securityRequirements.personnel: Favorable background investigation. Annual security training.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: FedRAMP Moderate physical security. SOC 2 Type II.

azureImplementation.region: Azure Government recommended. Azure Commercial with FedRAMP Moderate ATO acceptable.
azureImplementation.network: Azure Firewall. NSGs. Application Gateway with WAF. ExpressRoute recommended.
azureImplementation.identity: Azure AD with MFA and Conditional Access. PIM for privileged roles.
azureImplementation.encryption: Azure Key Vault with FIPS 140-2 Level 2. Customer-managed keys recommended.

fedRampBaselines.name: FedRAMP High Baseline
fedRampBaselines.dataClassification: High-impact federal information systems. Data loss would have severe or catastrophic adverse effect. Required for law enforcement, healthcare, financial, and other high-sensitivity federal data.

securityRequirements.encryption: FIPS 140-2 Level 2+ validated modules. Customer-managed keys mandatory. HSM recommended.
securityRequirements.network: Dedicated connections. Azure Firewall Premium. Full packet inspection. DDoS protection.
securityRequirements.personnel: Enhanced background investigation. Separation of duties. Least privilege enforced.
securityRequirements.physicalSecurity: FedRAMP High physical security. Dedicated infrastructure. Enhanced monitoring.

azureImplementation.region: Azure Government (US Gov Virginia, US Gov Arizona, US Gov Texas)
azureImplementation.network: Azure ExpressRoute. Azure Firewall Premium. DDoS Protection Standard. Web Application Firewall v2.
azureImplementation.identity: Azure AD for Government. CAC/PIV MFA. PIM mandatory. Conditional Access with compliant devices.
azureImplementation.encryption: Azure Key Vault Premium (FIPS 140-2 Level 2 HSM). Customer-managed keys for all services. TLS 1.2 minimum.
